message:
fix(integrations): handle JSONC block comments in root-brace parser

Extend find_root_close_brace() to skip /* ... */ block comments in
addition to the existing // line comment support. Without this, block
comments containing braces would throw off the depth tracking and
produce incorrect insertion positions for new hook entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
